guarantees: python_line is 1-based generated Python line number
pine_* fields preserve Pine source span when present in input AST, otherwise null
pine_source may include best-effort source/comment text
source maps are emitted beside every translated module
coverage metadata includes source_map coverage summary
limitations: not every generated helper line maps to a Pine line
generated scaffolding/import/runtime-contract lines may be intentionally unmapped
source map is a debugging/provenance artifact, not a full reversible compiler map
